title: Prefer Composed '@RequestMapping' Variants
description: Spring framework 4.3 introduced variants of the @RequestMapping annotation to better represent the semantics of the annotated methods. The use of @GetMapping, @PostMapping, @PutMapping, @PatchMapping and @DeleteMapping should be preferred to the use of the raw @RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.XYZ).
recommendation: Use @GetMapping, @PostMapping, @PutMapping, @PatchMapping and @DeleteMapping instead of raw @RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.XYZ).
impact: Improves security by reducing the risk of injection attacks.

checks.message: Prefer specific mapping annotations (@GetMapping, @PostMapping, etc.) over @RequestMapping with method parameter
